01 = Able to ride in a car only when driven by another person; OR able to use a bus or handicap van only when assisted or accompanied by another person.

M0740_CU_LAUNDRY (M0740) Current Laundry Current ability to do own laundry. 00 = (a) Able to independently take care of all laundry tasks; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to do laundry and access facilities,
